calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2007 Off Calendar

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2007 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Loretta Najera.
John M. Feder, Esq. for Petitioner: Melinda Bernardo, as Guardian at Litem for: Kaitlyn Coughran, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Gross Settlement $100,000.00
Attorney's Fees $24,787.84
Medical Lien $14,363.52
Costs $848.64
A net balance of $60,000.00 to be placed into a structured settlement with State Farm Life Insurance, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-09-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-21-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504
